{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8566390?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/yuliyu123", "id": 8566390, "login": "yuliyu123", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg1NjYzOTA=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/yuliyu123", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42328", "cvss": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}], "description": "The DAG-CBOR and DAG-JSON decoders recurse on each nested map or list without a depth limit. A payload containing deeply nested collections causes the decoder to recurse once per level, growing the goroutine stack until the Go runtime terminates the process with a fatal stack overflow (distinct from a recoverable panic).

For DAG-CBOR, a payload of approximately 2 MB, consisting of repeated `0x81` (array-of-1) bytes followed by a terminator, produces around 2 million recursion frames and reliably exhausts Go's default 1 GB goroutine stack. The existing allocation budget does not prevent this: each nested collection header costs only a handful of budget units, so the stack is exhausted before the budget is. DAG-JSON has equivalent exposure via `[[[...]]]`-style payloads; it has no budget system and is therefore unprotected against recursion depth as well.

Schema-free decoding (using `basicnode.Prototype.Any`) allows arbitrary nesting depth. Schema-bound decoding bounds nesting only when the schema itself is non-recursive and contains no fields typed as `Any`; schemas with recursive type references or any `Any`-typed fields permit unconstrained nesting at those points.

The fix adds a configurable `MaxDepth` option to both decoders, defaulting to 1024 nested levels. The decoder returns `ErrDecodeDepthExceeded` when a payload nests beyond the limit. Well-formed IPLD data rarely approaches this depth in practice; the default is generous for legitimate use while preventing stack exhaustion.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0012, "percentile": 0.02148}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T02:07:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42328"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T18:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T02:07:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ipld/go-ipld-prime/security/advisories/GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42328", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ipld/go-ipld-prime/security-advisories/GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ipld/go-ipld-prime", "summary": "go-ipld-prime's DAG-CBOR and DAG-JSON decoders have unbounded recursion depth", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:47:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w239-58x2-q8p5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.23.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/ipld/go-ipld-prime"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.23.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: go-ipld-prime's DAG-CBOR and DAG-JSON decoders have unbounded recursion depth
